title: UTV2-1177 atomic certification propagation batch RPC proof

sha_binding.verified_source_note: Proof source commit containing the non-runtime proof script, multi-PR lane reconciler support, and governance gate compatibility fixes. The atomic RPC blocker fix is commit 9096be7188e014f7cdec7baf12436a25494d9fd8.

atomic_propagation_rpc.append_only_behavior: PASS - the RPC performs INSERTs into certification_records and certification_transition_events only; no UPDATE or DELETE statements are present.
atomic_propagation_rpc.transactional_rollback_guarantee: PASS - PostgreSQL executes the PL/pgSQL RPC in one server-side transaction, so any insert failure aborts the entire propagation batch.
atomic_propagation_rpc.failure_path_test: PASS - apps/worker/src/certification-runtime.test.ts simulates an event insert failure and asserts no partial records or events are committed.

queries.description: database repository bundle persists a submission and settlement when Supabase is configured
UTV2-920 invalid atomic enqueue writes no lifecycle event or outbox row
UTV2-920 invalid atomic delivery confirmation rolls back outbox status, receipt, lifecycle, and audit writes
UTV2-920 invalid atomic settlement writes no settlement, lifecycle event, or audit row
UTV2-883 no duplicate participants for the same external_id and sport
UTV2-996 re-settling a settled pick creates correction, not duplicate base rows
UTV2-996 correction chain is additive and original settlement row is not mutated

row_counts.check: atomic propagation batch inserts certification records transactionally
atomic propagation batch inserts transition events transactionally
correction chain remains additive during DB smoke validation
